# Ranjan Dasgupta — AdTech Product Leader

> Lead Director, Web & CTV Exchange at InMobi. 9+ years in programmatic advertising, CTV monetization, and exchange architecture.

## Who is Ranjan Dasgupta?
Ranjan Dasgupta is a senior AdTech product leader currently at InMobi, where he leads the Web and CTV Exchange product. He has over 9 years of hands-on experience building programmatic infrastructure across Web, App, and Connected TV. He previously worked at Glance (InMobi Group), Automatad, and Google (DFP, AdX, AdSense, DoubleClick).

## Core Expertise
- Exchange architecture (OpenRTB, unified auctions, bid flow optimization)
- CTV monetization (SSAI/CSAI, ad podding, measurement)
- Header bidding (Prebid.js, server-side bidding, wrapper optimization)
- Yield optimization (floor pricing, bid shading, demand partner selection)
- Supply path optimization (sellers.json, ads.txt, auction efficiency)
- AI in advertising (agentic AI, contextual intelligence, AI-driven decisioning)

## Career Timeline
- 2025–present: InMobi — Lead Director, Web & CTV Exchange
- 2020–2025: Glance (InMobi Group) — Product Monetization, $200M+ revenue scaled
- 2019–2020: Automatad — Product Strategy
- 2015–2019: Google — DFP, AdX, AdSense, DV360

## Contact
- Website: https://ranjan.adsgupta.com

## Availability
Open to senior AdTech product roles, advisory engagements, and strategic partnerships.
